title: NVRO Metals and Hecla sign an MOU to process 35,000-tonnes at the NVRO Metals Hub in the Northern Territory, Australia
author: Nvro Metals Limited
description: NVRO Metals Limited has signed a non-binding memorandum of understanding with Hecla Mining Company to process approximately 35,000 tonnes of Hecla tailings at the NVRO Metals Hub in Australia's Northern Territory using the NVRO Process™. The agreement is conditional on successful completion of current test work on 20 tonnes of Hecla feedstock and completion of the Metals Hub acquisition by December 30, 2026. The MOU represents a milestone toward industrial-scale commercialization of NVRO's mineral processing technology.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Hecla is entering a non-binding agreement to test NVRO's processing technology on its tailings. While this represents a potential opportunity to recover value from waste materials, the MOU is conditional and non-binding, presenting limited immediate impact or commitment.

Hecla is entering a non-binding agreement to test NVRO's processing technology on its tailings. While this represents a potential opportunity to recover value from waste materials, the MOU is conditional and non-binding, presenting limited immediate impact or commitment.

title: Titan Appoints Richard Pozzebon as Chief Financial Officer to Support Strategic Growth and Project Development
author: Na
description: Titan Mining Corporation announced the appointment of Richard Pozzebon as Chief Financial Officer effective July 6, 2026. Pozzebon brings over 23 years of finance and capital markets experience, including 15+ years in the resource sector with publicly listed companies. He previously served as EVP and CFO of Interfor Corporation and held senior finance positions at Hecla Mining Company and Western Coal Corp. The appointment is intended to support Titan's strategic growth initiatives and capital allocation as the company advances multiple value-creation opportunities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only as a previous employer of the newly appointed CFO. No direct business impact or news related to Hecla Mining is discussed in the article.
Mentioned only as a previous employer of the newly appointed CFO. No direct business impact or news related to Hecla Mining is discussed in the article.

The appointment of an experienced CFO with 23 years of finance expertise and 15+ years in the resource sector signals management strengthening and confidence in executing strategic growth plans. The CEO's positive commentary about the hire and the company's focus on value-creation opportunities and critical minerals development support a positive outlook.

title: Silver Above $75 An Ounce And A Cobalt Camp Consolidator Just Engaged The Original Authors Of Its NI 43-101 To Build A New Resource Estimate
author: Fly On Wall Street
description: With silver trading above $75/oz and structural supply deficits continuing, Nord Precious Metals has engaged GeoVector to update its mineral resource estimate for the Gowganda Silver Tailings project. The company has consolidated 4km of historic property boundaries, reported high-grade silver intercepts (2,343 g/t), and validated a historic feasibility study showing technical viability. The article reviews comparable silver producers and their operational positions in the current market environment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Largest U.S. silver producer with record Q1 2026 results (3.9M oz production, $411M revenue), eliminated long-term debt, and maintains disciplined capital allocation with focus on silver-growth platform and reserve replacement.

Largest U.S. silver producer with record Q1 2026 results (3.9M oz production, $411M revenue), eliminated long-term debt, and maintains disciplined capital allocation with focus on silver-growth platform and reserve replacement.

Operating four producing silver mines in Mexico with strong operational leverage to spot silver prices. Q1 2026 showed revenue and cash-flow uplift. Positioned as high-beta name benefiting from elevated silver prices and planning Jerritt Canyon restart in H2 2027.

Transformed three-mine portfolio with Terronera achieving commercial production and serving as flagship growth asset. Pitarrilla project advancing toward feasibility study (Q3 2026) with potential construction decision in early 2027. Expected material production expansion as Terronera ramps up.

title: Meet the Unstoppable Vanguard ETF Beating the S&P 500, the Nasdaq-100, and the Dow Jones in 2026
author: Anthony Di Pizio
description: The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF is outperforming major U.S. indexes in 2026 with an 11.1% return year-to-date. Small-cap companies in the Russell 2000 are more insulated from geopolitical risks as they conduct most business domestically, while large-cap tech-heavy indexes face headwinds from global instability. The Russell's diversified sector composition and exposure to beneficiaries of U.S. government policies position it to continue outperforming in 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The ETF is outperforming major indexes with 11.1% YTD returns in 2026. Its diversified portfolio, domestic focus, and insulation from geopolitical risks position it favorably for continued outperformance.
Stock has surged 1,100% over the past year, benefiting from explosive demand for clean energy solutions from AI data center operators and U.S. manufacturing advantages.
Stock has tripled over 12 months, benefiting from surging gold and silver prices and North American mining operations insulated from geopolitical risks.

title: Silver Deficit Hits Sixth Straight Year as One Cobalt Camp Consolidator Prepares to Drill the Boundaries Past Producers Could Never Cross
author: Usa News Group
description: Silver has reached historic highs above $121/oz with six consecutive years of global supply deficits. Nord Precious Metals has consolidated nearly 4 kilometers of historic mining claims in Ontario's Cobalt-Gowganda silver camp, positioning itself to drill across boundaries where past producers stopped. The company has existing mill infrastructure, permits, and engineering partnerships to advance both boundary exploration and tailings recovery operations.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Reported Q1 2026 production of 3.5M oz silver and announced maiden inferred resource at Santo Niño discovery with 90.7M AgEq ounces. Commenced restart plan for Jerritt Canyon gold operation, demonstrating expansion in a favorable silver price environment.

Largest silver producer in US and Canada reported 17M oz silver production in 2025 with 231M oz reserves. Growing production at Greens Creek and Lucky Friday, increasing exploration investment to $55M, and divesting non-core assets to focus on silver portfolio.

Largest silver producer in US and Canada reported 17M oz silver production in 2025 with 231M oz reserves. Growing production at Greens Creek and Lucky Friday, increasing exploration investment to $55M, and divesting non-core assets to focus on silver portfolio.

Provided 2026 guidance of 8.3-8.9M oz silver and advancing Pitarrilla project toward feasibility study. Terronera commenced first full year of commercial production and Kolpa mine fully integrated following 2025 acquisition.
